title: drosera intermedia var. americana
intro: Drosera intermedia var. americana, also known as American sundew, is a carnivorous plant species that obtains essential nutrients by capturing and digesting insects. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Drosera intermedia var. americana include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as potential benefits for digestive health and immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
